goal: make essentia tubes directional instead of one generic all-connected pipe
implemented: EssentiaTubeConnections helper scans valid transport endpoints on each side.
EssentiaTubeBlock updates state on placement and neighbor changes.
EssentiaTubeBlock shape is built from center + connected arms.
EssentiaTubeBlock blockstate is now multipart, not one cube/static model.
EssentiaSuctionPath record added for upcoming backflow/conflict suction logic.
EssentiaTubeBlockEntity has directional traversal foundation token/method.
why_closer_to_original: TC4 tubes visually connect only to valid sides.
Connection sides are now represented in blockstate and model, not hidden in generic network logic.
This prepares exact suction conflict/backflow logic without repainting the system later.
remaining: Need per-side suction values and backflow resolution.
Need open/closed side caps and directional texture variants.
Need compile verification in GitHub Actions.
